no: Currently, only 3 new boots are added: Hardiness (+CON) +1, +2 and +3. Interesting but not enough variety to make up for the lost Cheetah boots I think Combino readme says it *copies* files instead of patching, so I'm not comfortable putting this after RR or Wares of the Planes In ToB, he’s in Saradush and, if you install the component for it, also in Amkethran.Install Rogue Rebalancing and mods that add new items before Kurosai the Combiner.
sum: This guy can combine 3 items +x for 1 item x+1. Work with all "+x" items.

co.n: Recipes cost less but require rare gems
A +1 copy of each object in SOA
